parameters.jsCode:
// Candidate new sources. Skip any whose source_id is already present.
const CANDIDATES = [
  { source_id:'src_aws_ml',      name:'AWS Machine Learning Blog',  url:'https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/feed/',                       type:'rss', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.85, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_cohere',      name:'Cohere Blog',                url:'https://cohere.com/blog/rss.xml',                                            type:'rss', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.85, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_databricks',  name:'Databricks Blog',            url:'https://www.databricks.com/feed',                                            type:'rss', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_stability',   name:'Stability AI News',          url:'https://stability.ai/news/rss.xml',                                          type:'rss', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.75, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_ieee_ai',     name:'IEEE Spectrum AI',           url:'https://spectrum.ieee.org/feeds/topic/artificial-intelligence.rss',         type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_latent_space',name:'Latent Space',               url:'https://www.latent.space/feed',                                              type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.75, notes:'Practitioner analysis' },
  { source_id:'src_import_ai',   name:'Import AI (Jack Clark)',     url:'https://importai.substack.com/feed',                                         type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.85, notes:'Top analyst newsletter' },
  { source_id:'src_ai_news',     name:'AI News',                    url:'https://www.artificialintelligence-news.com/feed/',                          type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.7,  notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_marktechpost',name:'MarkTechPost',               url:'https://www.marktechpost.com/feed/',                                         type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.65, notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_crunchbase_ai',name:'Crunchbase News \u2014 AI', url:'https://news.crunchbase.com/sections/ai/feed/',                              type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.75, notes:'AI funding/M&A signal' },
  { source_id:'src_simon_w',     name:'Simon Willison',             url:'https://simonwillison.net/atom/everything/',                                  type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Engineer/practitioner blog' },
  { source_id:'src_arstechnica_ai', name:'Ars Technica AI',         url:'https://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/ai',                               type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_wired_ai',    name:'Wired AI',                   url:'https://www.wired.com/feed/tag/ai/latest/rss',                               type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.75, notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_xai',         name:'xAI News',                   url:'https://x.ai/news',                                                          type:'html', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.75, notes:'Official \u2014 HTML scrape' },
  { source_id:'src_apple_ml',    name:'Apple Machine Learning',     url:'https://machinelearning.apple.com/rss.xml',                                  type:'rss', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.75, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_a16z',        name:'a16z',                       url:'https://a16z.com/feed/',                                                     type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.7,  notes:'VC perspective' },
  { source_id:'src_sequoia',     name:'Sequoia Capital',            url:'https://www.sequoiacap.com/feed/',                                           type:'rss', tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',              trust_score:0.7,  notes:'VC perspective' },
  { source_id:'src_perplexity',  name:'Perplexity Blog',            url:'https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog',                                         type:'html', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',            trust_score:0.7,  notes:'Official \u2014 HTML scrape' }
];
const existingIds = new Set($input.all().map(i => i.json.source_id).filter(Boolean));
const toAdd = CANDIDATES.filter(c => !existingIds.has(c.source_id));
return toAdd.map(r => ({ json: r }));

const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { status:'ok', appended: items.length, source_ids: items.map(i => (i.json && (i.json.source_id || (i.json.fields && i.json.fields.source_id))) || null) } }];
